details:
Solve various CAPTCHA types using CapMonster Cloud.

Supported CAPTCHA types:

• reCAPTCHA V2 / V2 Enterprise
• reCAPTCHA V3 / V3 Enterprise
• Cloudflare Turnstile
• GeeTest (V3 / V4)
• FunCaptcha (Arkose Labs)
• DataDome
• Imperva
• Amazon WAF
• Binance
• Basilisk
• TenDI
• Altcha
• Yidun
• Prosopo
• MTCaptcha
• Castle
• TSPD
• Hunt

You can also provide custom JSON tasks for advanced use cases.
